commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Of the rest, no one durst join himself to them. That is, none of those that did not believe: yet the people praised them, and the number of the faithful increased. (Witham)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: And as he had mentioned their being in Solomon's porch, that you may not wonder how the multitude allowed this, he tells us that they did not dare even to approach them: for no man, he says, dared join himself unto them.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
